name: ansi-color-escape
comment: GitHub Actions emits coloured logs (ANSI CSI sequences) when stdout is a TTY-equivalent. Local runs without color/no-tty produce the same text without escape codes. The textual payload after stripping the colour codes is identical. We use the bracket-only form ([32m...[0m, no leading ESC) here so the JSON is human-readable; the classifier matches both this form and the real \u001b[..m form a real harness will produce.
